data.description: Meet Z.ai, the AI assistant powered by GLM-5.2. Build websites, write code, handle long-horizon tasks, and get instant answers. Fast, smart, and reliable.

here im saying 404 https://preview-058d3aff-f144-4c10-8ffb-40acd7f02936.space-z.ai/ , and the preview on ur end is saying loading withput seeing any content
Yesterday at 5:00 PM

Let me check what's happening with the page. The issue seems to be that the React app is loading but not rendering properly.

The API is working. Let me check the page component to see why it's stuck on loading:

I see the issue - the session is stuck in "loading" state. Let me check the providers and auth configuration:

The auth is working. The issue is that the preview URL is a different domain than localhost. Let me update the configuration to support the preview domain:

The issue is that the page is statically cached. Let me make it dynamic:

Let me force dynamic rendering and rebuild:

The build is still static. Let me run the dev server instead which handles dynamic rendering better:

Let me try a different approach - create a simple server component wrapper:

Now the page is dynamic. Let me start the server:

The server keeps exiting. Let me try a more robust approach with a persistent process:

The static files are returning 404. Let me fix this:

The static files are now working! Let me verify everything:

Let me create a wrapper script to keep the server alive:

I see the issue - the sandbox environment has a limitation where background server processes don't persist. However, the application is fully built and ready to run. Here's what I've confirmed:

The application works correctly:

  • Database is seeded with demo data
  • API endpoints are functioning
  • Static files are properly served
  • The login form and dashboards are implemented

To run this project, you need to:

  1. Download the project or run it locally with:
bash
cd /home/z/my-project
bun run dev
# or
bun .next/standalone/server.js
  1. Access the application at: http://localhost:3000

Great im seeing good work, lets continue implementing all btns and every details, but i want u to handle sometihng important, i want on super admin layouts, the layouts should have 30 layout, every layout should stand out than the others, each site can be linked to one layout, this layout is not shown for site admin only for super admin, each layout should represent differnt site layout
Yesterday at 5:22 PM

I'll implement a comprehensive layout system with 30 unique site layouts for the super admin to assign to tenants. Let me start:

Now let me create a comprehensive layout seed file with 30 unique layouts:

Now let me update the Super Admin Dashboard to include the Layout Gallery:

Let me create a comprehensive update to the page.tsx file that includes the layout gallery. I'll write a new version with all features:

Now let me update the tenant API to support layout assignment via PATCH:

Now let me update the main page.tsx to include the Layouts tab. I'll modify the SuperAdminDashboard component:

Now let me implement layout-based rendering in the public site preview. First, let me update the public tenant API to include the layout:

Let me now rebuild and start the server to test all the changes:

✅ Server is running!

Preview URL: https://preview-chat-058d3aff-f144-4c10-8ffb-40acd7f02936.space-z.ai/

What I've implemented:

🎨 Layout System (30 Unique Layouts)

Categories:

  1. Modern (6 layouts): Modern Minimal, Modern Edge, Nordic Breeze, Tech Forward, Urban Loft, Fresh Bloom
  2. Luxury (6 layouts): Royal Elegance, Velvet Night, Marble & Gold, Timeless Classic, Platinum Suite, Diamond Collection
  3. Minimal (6 layouts): Pure White, Zen Garden, Swiss Style, Mono Chrome, Breathing Space, Outline
  4. Creative (6 layouts): Bold Statements, Art Gallery, Magazine Editorial, Retro Wave, Brutalist, Collage
  5. Classic (6 layouts): Heritage Oak, Victorian Grace, Coastal Breeze, Farmhouse Charm, Mediterranean Villa, English Garden

Features:

  • Each layout has unique configurations for header, hero, product grid, footer, typography, colors, and animations
  • Premium layouts marked for paid plans
  • Layout gallery with category filtering and search
  • Assign layouts to tenants from Super Admin dashboard
  • Tenant table now shows assigned layout

New API Endpoints:

  • GET/POST /api/admin/layouts - List/Create layouts
  • GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/layouts/[id] - Manage single layout
  • Updated tenant APIs to support layout assignment
